scripts.test:blocks: tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --outDir /tmp/hisohiso-block-test --noEmit false scripts/block-validation.test.ts && node /tmp/hisohiso-block-test/scripts/block-validation.test.js
scripts.test:app-lock: tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --outDir /tmp/hisohiso-app-lock-test --noEmit false scripts/app-lock.test.ts && node /tmp/hisohiso-app-lock-test/scripts/app-lock.test.js
scripts.test:app-passkey: tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --outDir /tmp/hisohiso-passkey-test --noEmit false scripts/app-passkey.test.ts && node /tmp/hisohiso-passkey-test/scripts/app-passkey.test.js
scripts.test:room-message: tsc --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --target ES2022 --outDir /tmp/hisohiso-room-message-test --noEmit false scripts/room-message-contracts.test.ts && node /tmp/hisohiso-room-message-test/scripts/room-message-contracts.test.js
